meta.siteDescription: Official website for Low Quality Interactive, a Roblox indie studio.
meta.organizationDescription: Low Quality Interactive is an independent Roblox game development studio focused on competitive multiplayer, tactical systems, and high-replayability sandbox experiences.

cookie.message: We use cookies. Just the boring kind, not the chocolate chip kind.

home.label: Home
home.description: Official website for Low Quality Interactive, a Roblox indie studio.
home.heading: We've been proudly underdelivering since FOREVER.
home.lead: We produce the most niche Roblox games of all time.

updatesShipped.label: Updates Shipped
updatesShipped.copy: Most of them broke something else.

cumulativeVisits.label: Cumulative Visits
cumulativeVisits.copy: At least 12 of those were us testing it.

games.label: Games
games.description: Current and upcoming games by Low Quality Interactive.
games.heading: Dead games and trash projects
games.lead: Tap any live game card to jump directly to that game's page, or use the update button to view the latest patch note.
games.descriptionRedacted: We are definitely working on this. Probably.

blogs.label: Updates
blogs.description: Development updates and patch notes from Low Quality Interactive.
blogs.heading: Update logs & patch notes
blogs.lead: Pick a game below to open its devlog.
blogs.viewerFallback: If this message stays here, the public update feed might be unavailable for a moment.

connect.label: Connect
connect.heading: Connect with us
connect.lead: We read every message. We respond to some of them.
connect.businessLead: For partnerships or other business matters:

notFound.description: Page not found on Low Quality Interactive.
notFound.heading: This page does not exist.
notFound.copy: This page underdelivered by not existing. Return to the homepage or browse our games.

blogsViewer.noDetails: No details recorded for this update.
blogsViewer.feedUnavailable: The update feed is unavailable right now. Please try again later.
blogsViewer.updatesAppearLater: Update logs will appear here once published.

eradication.description: A team-based territory control shooter where players work to reclaim their town from Whiskorians.
eradication.pageDescription: ERADICATION - a team-based territory control shooter on Roblox.
eradication.pageLead: Fight through escalating waves and survive as long as possible.

donpollo-obby.description: A meme-driven obby built around Don Pollo.
donpollo-obby.pageDescription: DON POLLO OBBY - meme-powered obstacle chaos on Roblox.
donpollo-obby.pageLead: Meme-powered obstacle chaos with fast restarts and speedrun routes.
donpollo-obby.artworkAlt: Don Pollo Obby floating course artwork

favela-94.description: A gritty close-quarters tactical shooter set in the favelas of 1994.
favela-94.pageDescription: Favela '94 - a gritty close-quarters tactical shooter on Roblox.
favela-94.pageLead: Fight through tight alleyways and rooftops in intense close-quarters combat.
